title: One Nation Party Wins Historic Seat, Changing Australian Politics
subtitle: A major victory in the Farrer byelection creates new challenges for the Coalition and its leadership.

summary.en: The One Nation party has won its first federal lower house seat in a historic byelection victory. This result has caused a major drop in support for the Liberal and National parties. Opposition leader Angus Taylor is now facing criticism from within his own party. One Nation leader Pauline Hanson says her party is prepared to stay in politics for a long time. The result has sparked a debate about the future direction of conservative politics in Australia.
summary.zh: 單一民族黨在一場歷史性的補選中，贏得了該黨在聯邦眾議院的首個席次。此結果導致自由黨與國家黨的支持率大幅下滑。反對黨領袖安格斯·泰勒目前面臨黨內批評。單一民族黨領袖寶琳·韓森表示，她的政黨已準備好長期參與政治。此結果引發了關於澳洲保守派政治未來走向的辯論。

paragraphs.en: The Australian political landscape has changed significantly following a historic byelection result in the seat of Farrer. On Saturday night, the right-wing populist party One Nation won its first-ever seat in the federal lower house. David Farley, the One Nation candidate, defeated the independent candidate Michelle Milthorpe. This victory is a major turning point for the party, which has historically struggled with internal stability, but now claims it is "here for the long haul."
paragraphs.zh: 澳洲政壇在法瑞爾選區（Farrer）舉行歷史性的補選後，出現了顯著的變化。週六晚間，右翼民粹主義政黨「單一民族黨」（One Nation）贏得了該黨在聯邦眾議院的首個席次。單一民族黨候選人大衛·法利（David Farley）擊敗了無黨籍候選人蜜雪兒·米爾索普（Michelle Milthorpe）。這場勝利對該黨而言是一個重大的轉捩點，該黨過去一直受困於內部不穩定，但如今聲稱他們「已做好長期經營的準備」。

paragraphs.en: For the Coalition—the group formed by the Liberal and National parties—the result was described as catastrophic. According to The Guardian, the Liberals saw their support drop by more than 30%. The party’s primary vote, which is the percentage of people who choose them as their first preference, fell below 13%. The Nationals also performed poorly, polling just under 10%. This loss is particularly significant because the Coalition had held the seat of Farrer for 76 years.
paragraphs.zh: 對於由自由黨（Liberal Party）與國家黨（National Party）組成的「聯盟」（Coalition）而言，此結果被形容為災難性的。根據《衛報》（The Guardian）報導，自由黨的支持率下滑超過百分之三十。該黨的首選票（即選民將其列為第一順位的比例）跌破百分之十三。國家黨的表現同樣低迷，得票率不到百分之十。這次挫敗之所以意義重大，是因為聯盟過去七十六年來一直穩守法瑞爾選區。

paragraphs.en: Following the defeat, pressure is mounting on the opposition leader, Angus Taylor. He has been in his position for only three months, but the Farrer result has caused internal rumblings and doubt among his colleagues. Some members of the Liberal Party are privately questioning his leadership. According to The Guardian, Taylor stated that the party would take "hard lessons" from the loss. He suggested that the result was partly due to recent internal chaos and a shift away from traditional values within the party.
paragraphs.zh: 敗選後，反對黨領袖安格斯·泰勒（Angus Taylor）面臨的壓力與日俱增。他上任僅三個月，但法瑞爾選區的結果已在黨內引發不滿與質疑。部分自由黨成員私下對他的領導能力提出質疑。根據《衛報》報導，泰勒表示黨內將從這次失敗中記取「慘痛教訓」。他暗示，結果部分歸因於近期黨內混亂，以及黨內逐漸背離傳統價值觀。

paragraphs.en: However, not everyone agrees with Taylor’s assessment. Sussan Ley, the former leader who was replaced by Taylor, issued a statement suggesting that the party is in a worse position now than it was before. She pointed out that when Taylor took over, he said the Liberal Party needed to "change or die." Ley noted that the Farrer result shows that this statement is even more true today. Some Liberal MPs have blamed the leadership change for the current situation, calling the loss the "price of undermining and destroying" Ley’s leadership.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，並非所有人都認同泰勒的評估。被泰勒取代的前任領袖蘇珊·萊伊（Sussan Ley）發表聲明指出，該黨目前的處境比過去更糟。她指出，泰勒接任時曾說自由黨必須「不改變就滅亡」。萊伊認為，法瑞爾選區的結果顯示這句話在今天更具真實性。一些自由黨國會議員將現狀歸咎於領導層更迭，稱這次敗選是「破壞並摧毀」萊伊領導地位所付出的代價。

paragraphs.en: Another point of conflict was the party's decision to support the One Nation candidate on their "how-to-vote" cards. These are cards given to voters at polling stations to show them how to rank candidates. By placing the One Nation candidate ahead of the independent candidate, some Liberal MPs felt the party betrayed its own values. They believe this decision gave their supporters permission to switch their vote to the right-wing party. Taylor defended this choice, claiming it was what the local Liberal voters in Farrer wanted.
paragraphs.zh: 另一個衝突點在於該黨決定在「投票指南」卡片上支持單一民族黨候選人。這些卡片是在投票所發給選民，用以指導他們如何排列候選人順位。由於將單一民族黨候選人排在無黨籍候選人之前，一些自由黨國會議員認為該黨背叛了自己的價值觀。他們相信這項決定等於允許支持者將選票轉投給右翼政黨。泰勒則為此選擇辯護，聲稱這是法瑞爾當地自由黨選民的意願。

paragraphs.en: One Nation’s success is not a surprise to everyone. Recent opinion polls have shown a steady increase in support for the party since the 2025 federal election. This trend is creating what some describe as an "existential threat"—a threat to the very existence—of the establishment conservative parties. Pauline Hanson, the leader of One Nation, told Sky News that her party is now challenging the major political parties. She accused these parties of being arrogant and taking voters for granted. Hanson stated that she wants to bring prosperity back to Australia and that her party is ready to lead.
paragraphs.zh: 單一民族黨的成功對某些人來說並不意外。近期的民調顯示，自二零二五年聯邦大選以來，該黨的支持率持續上升。這種趨勢正對傳統保守派政黨造成一些人所稱的「生存威脅」。單一民族黨領袖寶琳·韓森（Pauline Hanson）告訴天空新聞台（Sky News），她的政黨現在正挑戰各大主流政黨。她指責這些政黨傲慢且將選民的支持視為理所當然。韓森表示，她希望為澳洲帶回繁榮，且她的政黨已準備好執政。

paragraphs.en: Looking ahead, the Liberal Party faces a difficult path. Moderate members of the party are worried that the current leadership is too focused on reacting to One Nation’s agenda, especially regarding immigration. Instead of moving the party toward the political center to attract more voters, they fear the party is becoming too narrow in its focus. While there is no immediate threat to Taylor’s position as leader, the party is clearly struggling to find its way after such a significant loss.
paragraphs.zh: 展望未來，自由黨面臨艱難的道路。黨內溫和派成員擔心，目前的領導層過於專注於回應單一民族黨的議程，特別是在移民問題上。他們擔心黨內焦點變得過於狹隘，而非轉向政治中間路線以吸引更多選民。雖然泰勒的領袖地位目前並未受到立即威脅，但在經歷如此重大的挫敗後，該黨顯然正努力尋找方向。

paragraphs.en: The Farrer byelection serves as a clear warning to the major parties. Voters are increasingly looking for alternatives, and the traditional dominance of the Liberal and National parties is being challenged. As the party begins its postmortem—a process of examining what went wrong—the debate over whether to change their policies or double down on their current direction will likely continue to cause tension within the Coalition.
paragraphs.zh: 法瑞爾選區的補選對各大主流政黨發出了明確的警告。選民越來越傾向尋求替代選擇，自由黨與國家黨的傳統優勢正受到挑戰。隨著該黨開始進行選後檢討（即審視失敗原因的過程），關於是否應改變政策或堅持當前路線的辯論，可能會持續在聯盟內部引發緊張局勢。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A long period of time that something will take to complete or endure.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常與 'for the' 連用，指長期抗戰或長期經營。文中：David Farley, the One Nation candidate, defeated the independent candidate Michelle Milthorpe. This victory is a major turning point for the party, which has historically struggled with internal stability, but now claims it is "here for the long haul."

keyTerms.definitionEn: Signs of growing discontent or secret complaints among a group of people.
keyTerms.noteZh: 原意指雷聲或肚子餓的咕嚕聲，這裡指組織內部的抱怨或騷動。文中：He has been in his position for only three months, but the Farrer result has caused internal rumblings and doubt among his colleagues.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To strengthen one's commitment to a particular strategy or course of action, especially one that is risky or controversial.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 加倍投入、堅持己見（即使面臨風險）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 原為賭博術語，指加倍下注，現常用於政治或商業決策。文中：As the party begins its postmortem—a process of examining what went wrong—the debate over whether to change their policies or double down on their current direction will likely continue to cause tension within the Coalition.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Pressure mounts on Angus Taylor as Pauline Hanson declares One Nation ‘here for the long haul’

quiz.question: What specific action did the Liberal Party take in Farrer that caused internal disagreement among its own members?

options.A: They replaced their candidate Michelle Milthorpe with a new, inexperienced politician.
options.B: They included the One Nation candidate in a higher position than the independent candidate on their voting guidance cards.
options.C: They officially merged their primary vote with the National Party to consolidate support.
options.D: They publicly criticized their former leader, Sussan Ley, for her past policy decisions.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第五段，自由黨在「投票指南卡」（how-to-vote cards）上將「國家黨」（One Nation）候選人排在獨立候選人之前，這被黨內成員認為背叛了黨的價值觀，並間接導致選票流失。選項 A 錯誤，因為 Michelle Milthorpe 是獨立候選人，而非自由黨人。選項 C 文章未提及合併投票。選項 D 雖然提到黨內對領袖更迭有爭議，但並非指自由黨公開批評前領袖是導致敗選的「投票卡」爭議。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might the Liberal Party's strategy of 'changing' under Angus Taylor be failing?

options.A: Because the party has completely abandoned its traditional values to attract younger voters.
options.B: Because the party is focusing too much on the political center instead of its core conservative base.
options.C: Because the party is seen as reactive and narrow, struggling to define a clear identity beyond responding to One Nation.
options.D: Because Angus Taylor has refused to acknowledge that the party's previous policies were problematic.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第七段，溫和派成員擔心現任領導層過於專注於回應「國家黨」的議程（如移民問題），導致黨的焦點過於狹隘，而非向中間靠攏。這顯示該黨在選民眼中缺乏獨立的願景。選項 A 與文章描述相反，文章提到有人認為黨偏離了傳統價值。選項 B 錯誤，文章指出他們被批評「未能」向中間靠攏。選項 D 錯誤，因為文章第三段提到 Taylor 承認需要吸取「慘痛教訓」。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the term 'postmortem' refer to in the context of the Liberal Party's situation?

options.A: A public apology issued to the voters of Farrer.
options.B: The process of analyzing the reasons for their election defeat.
options.C: The formal resignation of the party's leadership team.
options.D: A strategy to attack the political platforms of opposing parties.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在文中，「postmortem」一詞原意為「驗屍」，在此比喻為對選舉失敗原因的全面檢討與分析。選項 A 錯誤，道歉只是檢討的一部分，而非整個過程。選項 C 錯誤，雖然黨內有壓力，但文章並未說這代表領導層集體辭職。選項 D 錯誤，這是一個內部的反思過程，而非針對對手的攻擊策略。

quiz.question: What is the central message of the article regarding the Farrer byelection?

options.A: The Farrer byelection was a minor event that will have little impact on national Australian politics.
options.B: The success of One Nation is solely due to the personal charisma of Pauline Hanson.
options.C: The Liberal Party's defeat in Farrer highlights a significant shift in voter behavior and challenges the dominance of traditional political parties.
options.D: The main reason for the Liberal Party's loss was the poor performance of the National Party in the same region.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文的核心在於分析 Farrer 選區補選的結果，這不僅是自由黨的慘敗，更象徵著選民對傳統兩大黨的不滿，以及「國家黨」等民粹勢力的崛起，這對澳洲傳統政治版圖構成了挑戰。選項 A 與文章第一、八段矛盾。選項 B 錯誤，文中提到的是選民對主流政黨的不滿與替代選擇的需求，而非僅是個人魅力。選項 D 錯誤，雖然兩黨皆表現不佳，但文章重點在於自由黨自身的結構與策略問題。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
